sourceMovie.title: Sunset Boulevard
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Sunset Boulevard works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Silence of the Lambs
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sunset Boulevard clicked for you, The Silence of the Lambs (1991) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sunset Boulevard clicked for you, Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sunset Boulevard?
faq.answer: Try The Silence of the Lambs, Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind, Blade Runner—each shares DNA with Sunset Boulevard while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sunset Boulevard?
faq.answer: Sunset Boulevard (1950) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sunset Boulevard worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
